'''gayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeiosis|zeiosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeiosis|zeiosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gayaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæyækæth|gæyækæth]] || [[word:gæyækæj|gæyækæj]] || [[word:gæyækæsh|gæyækæsh]] || [[word:gæyækæ|gæyækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayayakath|gayayakath]] || [[word:gayayakaj|gayayakaj]] || [[word:gayayakash|gayayakash]] || [[word:gayayaka|gayayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayakath|gayakath]] || [[word:gayakaj|gayakaj]] || [[word:gayakash|gayakash]] || [[word:gayaka|gayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayafkath|gayafkath]] || [[word:gayafkaj|gayafkaj]] || [[word:gayafkash|gayafkash]] || [[word:gayafkaf|gayafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gayakatha|gayakatha]] || [[word:gayakaja|gayakaja]] || [[word:gayakasha|gayakasha]] || [[word:gayakaka|gayakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gayakath|gayakath]] || [[word:gayakaj|gayakaj]] || [[word:gayakash|gayakash]] || [[word:gayaka|gayaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gayakathal|gayakathal]] || [[word:gayakajal|gayakajal]] || [[word:gayakashal|gayakashal]] || [[word:gayakakal|gayakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gayakathatha|gayakathatha]] || [[word:gayakajaja|gayakajaja]] || [[word:gayakashasha|gayakashasha]] || [[word:gayakaka|gayakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gayakathan|gayakathan]] || [[word:gayakajan|gayakajan]] || [[word:gayakashan|gayakashan]] || [[word:gayakakan|gayakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gayakathaoro|gayakathaoro]] || [[word:gayakajaoro|gayakajaoro]] || [[word:gayakashaoro|gayakashaoro]] || [[word:gayakakaoro|gayakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
